userMessage: Recall session from C:/tests/baseline.tss, add amplitude on CH1, query result, save waveform and screenshot

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Built a server-side common TekAutomate flow.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Generated Flow","description":"Common TekAutomate scope flow built server-side.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"1","type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"2","type":"recall","label":"Recall session","params":{"recallType":"SESSION","filePath":"C:/tests/baseline.tss"}},{"id":"3","type":"write","label":"Clear existing measurements","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:DELETEALL"}},{"id":"4","type":"group","label":"Add measurements","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"m1","type":"write","label":"Add amplitude measurement on CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS AMPLITUDE;MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOUrce1 CH1"}}]},{"id":"5","type":"group","label":"Read measurement results","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"q1","type":"query","label":"Query amplitude result for CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_amplitude"}}]},{"id":"6","type":"save_waveform","label":"Save CH1 waveform","params":{"source":"CH1","filename":"ch1.bin","format":"bin"}},{"id":"7","type":"save_screenshot","label":"Save screenshot","params":{"filename":"capture.png","scopeType":"modern","method":"pc_transfer"}},{"id":"8","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]}}]}}]}
